final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic card for children explaining the Three Kingdoms Battle of Red Cliffs.

Style/medium: flat vector infographic, educational children's illustration, storybook cartoon style with friendly character designs
Composition: single large knowledge card layout, title at top, main story illustration occupying central space, bullet points aligned in sidebar
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from Three Kingdoms era, simplified historical narrative for young learners, cartoon figures of key characters
Scene/backdrop: stylized Yangtze River battle scene, simplified warships, fire arrows, cartoon clouds and water
Lighting/mood: bright and cheerful daytime, clear visibility, engaging and educational atmosphere
Color palette: warm oranges and reds for fire elements, cool blues for water, earth tones for land, high contrast for readability
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: must be readable for children ages 6-12; all text must be large and legible; bullet points must use proper punctuation
Avoid: realistic violence or gore; overly complex historical details; dark or scary imagery; small unreadable text; cluttered layout
